caption: A screen recording shows a web browser window displaying a complex network map on a dark background, featuring various circular icons connected by colored lines and labels. Text within the map includes phrases such as "the thinking," "the feeling," "the sensing," and "the wanting." A video call overlay is visible in the upper right, showing a man wearing a dark baseball cap. As the sequence progresses, the network map is manipulated, with some nodes disappearing and others shifting position. A small image of a seated figure in white clothing appears in the bottom right area of the browser window. The browser tabs at the top include titles such as "Truth & Learning by Synectics," "Future of Society by Synectics," and "Rural Community Food System." By the end of the sequence, much of the network map has faded, leaving only a few highlighted nodes and the image of the seated figure.
